seoTitle: Bundi vs Bundoora — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bundi and Bundoora. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bundi and Bundoora.
heading: Bundi vs Bundoora — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bundi, Queensland and Bundoora, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bundi has a lower overall climate risk score (25/100) compared to Bundoora (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bundi or Bundoora safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bundi has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Bundoora scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bundi scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Bundoora scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bundi or Bundoora?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bundi has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.47% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
